commands.title: Process creation - template
commands.description: Placeholder. Replace filters with your hunt criteria.
commands.command:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType == "ProcessCreated"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
| take 100

commands.title: Outbound connection - template
commands.description: Placeholder. Filter by remote IP, port, or process.
commands.command:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where RemotePort == 443
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, RemoteIP, RemotePort
| take 100

commands.title: Failed sign-ins - template
commands.description: Placeholder. Add account, IP, or app filters as needed.
commands.command:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize FailedAttempts = count() by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress
| order by FailedAttempts desc

commands.title: Risky sign-ins - template
commands.description: Placeholder. Requires Entra ID P2 / Identity Protection.
commands.command:
AADIdentityProtectionSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("medium", "high")
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, RiskLevelDuringSignIn, RiskDetail

commands.title: Malicious email - template
commands.description: Placeholder. Defender for Office 365 / MDO required.
commands.command:
EmailEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ThreatTypes has "Phish"
| project Timestamp, SenderFromAddress, RecipientEmailAddress, Subject, DeliveryAction

commands.title: Encoded PowerShell - template
commands.description: Placeholder. Hunt for common LOLBin abuse patterns.
commands.command:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe"
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-enc", "-EncodedCommand", "FromBase64String")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine

commands.title: Schtasks creation - template
commands.description: Placeholder. Scheduled task creation via command line.
commands.command:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName =~ "schtasks.exe"
| where ProcessCommandLine has "Create"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine
